title: ACCOUNTING OUTSOURCING & TRANSACTION ADVISORY
shortDescription: Comprehensive accounting outsourcing and transaction advisory services with AI-powered tools for accurate financial record keeping and regulatory compliance.
details:
At TAC, we assist our clients with Accounting Outsourcing and Transaction Advisory Services, which include adequate financial record keeping, reconciliation, and addressing complex financial structures, regulatory reporting etc. We provide these services either onsite or offsite, by deploying our skilful and dedicated resources.

We deploy Accounting Software, Automated System, and Strong AI Accounting tools, to deliver value-added accounting & financial transaction record keeping and reconciliation that comply with local and international financial reporting.

With experts who come from a wide range of disciplines, we assure our clients of unequalled benefits such as competitive rates, quick turnaround time, guaranteed data protection, and quality service delivery.

title: AUDIT & ASSURANCE
shortDescription: Risk-based audit services compliant with IFRS, IAS, and GAP, utilizing AI-powered audit tools for comprehensive assurance and performance improvement.
details:
We provide our auditing services in compliance with the Companies and Allied Matters Act of Nigeria, and in compliance with International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS), General Audit Practice (GAP) and International Accounting Standards (IAS). Our audit approach is all-encompassing of risk-based systems audit, assessment of systems and processes.

Apart from satisfying the primary objective of reporting on business and financial statements of corporate firms in line with IFRS, it also aims at performance improvement, internal control evaluation and financial management to ensure good corporate governance. We ensure that we have a thorough understanding of our client's business, corporate culture and operational environment.

With our Audit Software, Automated System, and Strong AI Audit tools, we deliver value-added audit & assurance services to the satisfaction and admiration of our clients in line with global best practice.

title: TAX COMPLIANCE & ADVISORY
shortDescription: Comprehensive tax planning, management, and advisory services including Nigeria Tax Reform Act advisory, corporate tax, VAT, WHT, transfer pricing, and more.
details:
TAC Tax Advisory Services provide comprehensive taxation planning, management & advisory services to corporate and individual clients with the aim of minimizing their tax burden through careful tax planning. Using our expertise and skill, we study and take advantage of loopholes in the tax laws to reduce clients' tax liabilities.

In meeting with the global demand of delivering the best professional services to our numerous clients, the company ensures that all its staff are adequately empowered and updated with the current laws & statues and practical approach on tax planning & management services through sound training, seminars & courses obtained both locally & internationally.

Our customised Tax automated system and AI Tax support tools, gives us a good standing in delivering efficient and effective Tax compliance & Advisory services to our numerous clients.

services.title: The Nigeria Tax Reform Act – Our Advisory Service
services.description: The Nigeria Tax Reform Acts represent a fundamental shift in how taxation is administered, enforced, and interpreted in Nigeria. Our advisory service is designed to help businesses, investors, NGOs, and individuals understand the real impact of the reforms on their operations and decisions, identify areas of exposure early, and implement practical solutions that are compliant, defensible, and commercially sound.

services.title: Corporate Tax Management (CIT, PPT EDT)
services.description: Comprehensive corporate tax planning, management & advisory services ensuring compliance obligations and tax efficiency. Includes detailed review of business models, preparation and filing of annual CIT returns, reconciliation with Audited Financial Statements, processing of Tax Clearance Certificates, and representation during tax audits.

services.title: Business Transactions Tax (E-invoicing, VAT, WHT)
services.description: Support in managing transaction-based taxes with focus on accuracy, documentation, and audit readiness. Includes E-invoicing support services, VAT services for domestic and cross-border transactions, and comprehensive WHT services including credit recovery support.

services.title: Transfer Pricing
services.description: Practical transfer pricing advisory and compliance services aligned with the strengthened enforcement framework. Includes review of related-party transactions, development of transfer pricing policies, preparation of documentation, and support during audits.

services.title: Personal Income Tax Administration
services.description: Efficient management of employee tax obligations ensuring employees pay minimum tax possible. Includes PAYE administration, structuring employees' pay in tax-efficient manner, processing annual tax forms, and obtaining tax clearance certificates.

services.title: Other Tax Management Services
services.description: Processing of Economic Development Incentive Certificate, Common Reporting Standard (CRS) Management, Country-by-Country Reporting (CbCR), Strategic Tax Planning & Tax Health Checks, Tax Audit Management, Payroll Restructuring, Stamp Duties Support, and Immigration Support Service.

title: FORENSIC INVESTIGATION & ACCOUNTING
shortDescription: Certified forensic experts providing fraud detection, prevention, and investigation services for criminal matters, civil litigation, and corporate investigations.
details:
Forensic audit & accounting is the process of detecting, preventing and correcting fraudulent activities. It includes the auditing of accounting records to prove or disprove fraud. It deals with the relation and application of financial facts to legal problems. Forensic accounting evidence is oriented to a court of law.

Fraud investigation entails the detection and prevention of frauds in commercial transactions. It also involves creating an environment that reduces and discourages fraudulent activities. As forensic accountants, we react to complain arising in criminal matters, statement of claims arising in civil litigation, and rumors and inquiries arising in corporate investigations.

As Certified Forensic expert we carry out various forensic assignments in line with our mandate and terms of engagement.

title: BUSINESS CONSULTING & ADVISORY
shortDescription: High-quality solution-driven business consulting, financial advisory services, and corporate strategies to improve performance and competitive advantage.
details:
At TAC, our Business Consulting & Financial Advisory unit provides high quality solution driven Business & Management Consulting/Financial Advisory Services & Corporate Strategies to clients in various sectors of the economy. Our focus is to visibly improve the performance of our client, giving them that competitive advantage through sound solution driven advisory, strategy and assurance services that enhance performance.

We offer wide range of consultancy services tailored to meet specific needs of our clientele. We are committed to satisfying our clients, giving them that competitive advantage though sound human capital base, structure & process to enhance performance.

Our Business Consulting and Advisory unit is run by expert managers and consultants with extensive experience with significant exposure and technical know-how in their area of specialization. We draw strong technical competence from our international affiliation 'Integra International' and other global firms and consultant advisers in our cross functional approach to executing assignments.

title: INTERNAL CONTROL & RISK MANAGEMENT
shortDescription: Comprehensive internal audit outsourcing services ensuring transparency, accountability, and good corporate governance through independent professional audits.
details:
Where we do not act as external auditors, we provide comprehensive internal audit outsourcing services to clients. With the trend of breach in internal control and active connivance of company staff (at high & low level) to defraud & mismanage organizations financial resources; companies outsource their internal audit functions to our organization.

We carry out client internal audit functions in an independent and professional manner that entrench & institute sound & adequate internal control system, process & procedure thereby reducing financial wastages, bloated expenditure, fraud & misappropriation of funds. Our internal audit services ensure transparency, accountability & good corporate governance that gives comfort & assurance to Owners of business, Investors & Board Members.
services: Act as an independent unit that will monitor & enforce system & policy compliance
Ensure adequate accounting & internal control system
Monitor & ensure strict compliance with operational, accounting & internal control system & procedure
Ensure that management & staff abide by the company's rules & regulations
Carry out continuous internal audit functions
Carry out specialized and specific investigation or audit as mandated by the Board
Act as watch dog and report to the Board of Directors
